column1: Net LTV per buyer = sum of all net order values for that buyer
Net order value = gross order value * 0.935 (Etsy 6.5% transaction fee) - $0.20 (listing fee per item)
Cohort LTV avg = sum of net LTV for all buyers in cohort / count of buyers in cohort
Email ROI = revenue from Kit subscribers making 2nd purchase this month / total Kit emails sent this month
Email ROI target: $0.10+ per email sent (i.e. $10 per 100 emails sent)
Phase2_vs_Phase1_LTV_Ratio = current month cohort LTV avg / Phase 1 baseline LTV ($28.53)
Target ratio by Month 3: 2.0x ($57 LTV) — achievable with Campaigns 2 and 3 running
Target ratio by Month 6: 3.0x ($85 LTV) — requires VIP loyalty and Herbalist bundle-to-practitioner conversion
Herbalist LTV is 2x Gift Buyer LTV
